title: cyperus consanguineus var. usterii
intro: Cyperus consanguineus var. usterii, also known as East Indian flatsedge, is a type of sedge plant native to India and other parts of Asia. It is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce pain and swelling. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyperus consanguineus var. usterii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tea or poultice.
